hisobotlar bolimiga excelnikidaka tablitsa qilib ber va u tablitsa katta bolsin yoki tablitsa yaratish tugmasini qosh uni bossa tablitsa oyna ochiladi excelnikidaka funksiyalar boladi lekin toliq excelnikidaka emas yani katakchani bosib tursa yoki sichqonchani ong tugmasini bossa oynacha chiqadi unda katakchani boyash stanok metrini korsatishi uchun stanokga boglash, ochirish , formatlash  oynachasi chiqadi stanokga boglasa real vaqtda boglangan stanokni metr korinib turishi kerak ammo smena soat 07:00dan 19:00 gacha boladi kunduzgisi bir smena tugagandan keyin ikkinchi smena boshlanadi katakka stanok briktrish vaqtida qaysi smenaniki korsatilishini ham aniqlashtrib olinsin
saqlash bosilsa yangi pdf fayl yaratiladi va boyagi ssaqlangan tablitsa asosida pdf yaratiladi saqlashdapdf nomini ham soralsin

The user wants me to create an Excel-like table feature in the Hisobotlar (Reports) section. Let me break down the requirements:

1. Excel-like table with large cells
2. A button to create a new table - opens a window with Excel-like functions
3. Right-click or long-press on a cell shows a context menu with:
   - Color the cell
   - Link to a machine (stanok) to show meter readings
   - Delete
   - Format options
4. When linking to a machine, show real-time meter data
5. Shifts: Day shift 07:00-19:00, Night shift 19:00-07:00


6. When linking a machine, also detect which shift it belongs to
7. Save button creates a PDF file and asks for the PDF name
